name: codeforge-requirements
description: + CFP-2432 (2026-06-27) — ChangeImpactAgent model:sonnet 비준 (ADR-042 Amendment 16 §D4): frontmatter 값 변경 0(이미 sonnet) + ADR-042 Amd5 / ADR-057 §결정3 의 opus 확정(사용자 verbatim 'changeimpact는 내가 보기에 opus가 괜찮아보인다')을 2026-06-27 directive('sonnet 범위 확장')로 명시 reversal(silent override 금지) 주석. 역할=읽기전용 src/** 코드 델타 매핑 단일 축 = §결정1 Sonnet (a) single-mandate advocacy 정합. 정책-파일 tier drift 해소. comment-only(mandate 변경 0) → 0.9.0 → 0.9.1 PATCH. marketplace version sync(ADR-063). codeforge 요구사항 레인 — RequirementsPLAgent + DomainAgent + RequirementsAnalyst + ResearcherAgent + ChangeImpactAgent + FeasibilityAgent + ContinuityAgent + codex-proactive-check. 7-way 병렬 관점 통합 (기존 4 + 코드 컨텍스트 3) + Codex worker proactive check. Domain Knowledge + Story §2/§5/§6/§4.1/§4.2/§4.3 self-write. codeforge core 의존. + CFP-379 RequirementsPLAgent·DomainAgent·RequirementsAnalyst·ResearcherAgent·ChangeImpactAgent·FeasibilityAgent·ContinuityAgent Opus 승격 (ADR-042 Amendment 4, ADR-057, 2026-05-11). + CFP-411 RequirementsPLAgent semantic divergence detection 3 criteria + codex-proactive-check worker 신설 (dispatch_mode auto_on_divergence) + ADR-052 Amendment 1 touchpoint #4 multi-round debate 격상 (ADR-059, 2026-05-11). + CFP-448 ChangeImpactAgent model Opus → Sonnet (ADR-057 Amendment 3 selective rollback, mandate text 변경 0건 — exclusion criterion 정합, 2026-05-12). + CFP-510 RequirementsPLAgent divergence detection 4 영역 확장 (3 semantic + 1 factual fact-check, 4 sub-criteria) + PL self-evaluation 의무 (fact claim marker 5종) + codex-proactive-check fact-check sub-criteria SSOT (ADR-052 Amendment 3, 2026-05-13). + CFP-1764 Story-3 (ADR-071 Amendment 8 horizontal axis 자매, 2026-05-27) — DomainAgent / ResearcherAgent / RequirementsAnalystAgent 3 agent prompt template 본문에 평이 어휘 의무 directive 추가 (codename → 평이 어휘 lookup + 치환, lookup SSOT = wrapper docs/wording-dictionary.md 카테고리 (c) 15 batch). 사용자 dialog paste 영역 jargon leak 차단. + CFP-2328 ResearcherAgent Mandate 2 demand-anchored 재초점(개념 정립 지원 + unknown-unknown proactive 발굴) + concept silo close-loop read + §6 외부지식 하류 도달 주 채널 = Section 5 reshape 정정 (ADR-046 Amendment 2, strengthen 방향 — 하류 기술자료 제공은 S2/S5 이관, 2026-06-17).
